meaning: 辽宁(位于中国东北地区南部)
examples: A case of suspected food poisoning in a kindergarten in Liaoning Province has led to several children being sent to hospital.
What do you think of the basketball match between Liaoning and Guangdong?
Li was a salesman in a company in Liaoning Province in 2012.
China Daily says police in Liaoning have also arrested suspects in a fake mutton scam.
Zhongwang, based in Liaoning, kept the loan on its books but disclaimed any responsibility for repayment.
